    M

    M16 - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.weaponInstances
    M16 represents a specific weapon type, inheriting common behavior from the Weapon class.

    MeleeHitBox - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons
    The MeleeHitBox class represents the area of effect for melee attacks in the game.
    MeleeHitBox(double, double, double, double, double, Team) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.MeleeHitBox
    Constructs a new MeleeHitBox with the provided parameters.
    MeleeWeapon - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons
    The MeleeWeapon class represents a melee-type weapon used within the game.
